events6.name: X-record
events6.desc:
Crossover event between SOUND VOLTEX EXCEED GEAR and beatmania IIDX 28 BISTROVER. Crossover songs are unlocked by earning LM and VM points.
However, since it's difficult to replicate such crossover event in Asphyxia, you can just toggle the corresponding SOUND VOLTEX songs' option to automatically unlock them on your next login.
info: Song 1: Chewingood!!! -- from beatmania IIDX 28 BISTROVER
Song 2: Verflucht -- from beatmania IIDX 21 SPADA
Song 3: ディスコルディア

events6.name: X-record 第二弾
events6.desc:
Crossover event between SOUND VOLTEX EXCEED GEAR and beatmania IIDX 29 CastHour. Crossover songs are unlocked by earning LM and VM points.
However, since it's difficult to replicate such crossover event in Asphyxia, you can just toggle the corresponding SOUND VOLTEX songs' option to automatically unlock them on your next login.
info: Song 1: Fegrix -- from beatmania IIDX 29 CastHour
Song 2: ピアノ協奏曲第1番"蠍火" -- from beatmania IIDX 11 IIDX RED

events6.name: X-record 第三弾
events6.desc:
Crossover event between SOUND VOLTEX EXCEED GEAR and beatmania IIDX 30 RESIDENT. Crossover songs are unlocked by earning LM and VM points.
However, since it's difficult to replicate such crossover event in Asphyxia, you can just toggle the corresponding SOUND VOLTEX songs' option to automatically unlock them on your next login.
info: Song 1: 儚キ戀ノ幻想譚 -- from beatmania IIDX 30 RESIDENT
Song 2: 禊 -- from beatmania IIDX 29 CastHour

events6.name: グレイスからの挑戦状!! (GRACE kara no chousenjou!!)
events6.desc:
Songs that are originally unlocked by having played it first on the コナステ (Konasute) version of Sound Voltex.
Toggle the individual song option to unlock them on your next login.
info: Unlocks ドゥサンコオデッセイ!! upon logging in.
Unlocks Reverenced Flower upon logging in.

events6.name: BPL応援 楽曲解禁スタンプラリー (BPL ouen gakkyoku kaikin stamp rally)
events6.desc:
Songs in this event are originally unlocked by accessing the official BEMANI PRO LEAGUE 2021 website and obtaining the stamp by watching VODs of the BPL competition.
However, since it's difficult to replicate such crossover event in Asphyxia, you can just toggle the corresponding SOUND VOLTEX songs' option to automatically unlock them on your next login.
info: Unlocks カジノファイヤーことみちゃん upon logging in.
Unlocks STEEL NEEDLE upon logging in.

events6.name: BEMANI 2021真夏の歌合戦5番勝負 (BEMANI 2021 manatsu no utagassen 5 ban shoubu)
events6.desc:
This is a cross-BEMANI event. Songs are originally unlocked by playing participating BEMANI games and earn 'Yell' points.
However, since it's difficult to replicate such crossover event in Asphyxia, you can just toggle the corresponding SOUND VOLTEX songs' option to automatically unlock them on your next login.
info: 2nd Stage: MOVE! (We Keep It Movin') -- TEAM BLUE
3rd Stage: LIKE A VAMPIRE -- TEAM RED
4th Stage: スーパー戦湯ババンバーン -- TEAM BLUE
6th Stage:  ユメブキ -- TEAM RED

events6.name: SOUND VOLTEX 10th Anniversary
events6.desc: Stamp event to unlock 7 songs in any order. As of 07/06/2023, all the songs included in this event can now be unlocked via PCB.
events6.info: Toggle this on to enable/disable this stamp event.

events6.name: REFLEC BEAT Song Stamp Event
events6.desc:
Stamp event to unlock 5 songs originally from the REFLEC BEAT game series.

As of 01/30/2024, these songs are now unlockable via PCB.
events6.info: Toggle this on to enable/disable this stamp event.

events6.name: いちかのごちゃまぜMix UP！ (Ichika no gochamaze Mix UP!)
events6.desc:
This is a cross-BEMANI event. Songs include some that are shared from other BEMANI games and some that are mashup/remixes of the shared songs. These are originally unlocked by playing participating BEMANI games and earning points to fill different gauges.

However, since it's difficult to replicate such crossover event in Asphyxia, you can just toggle the corresponding SOUND VOLTEX songs' option to automatically unlock them on your next login.

As of 01/30/2024, these songs are now unlockable via PCB.
info: Song 1: perditus†paradisus -- from beatmania IIDX 18 Resort Anthem
Song 4: White Stream -- Four Leaves × Snowmelt remix

events6.name: BEMANI PRO LEAGUE SEASON 2 Original Song Contest
events6.desc:
Songs revealed for the BEMANI PRO LEAGUE Season 2 sightread challenges.
Toggle to have the songs from their corresponding week unlocked on the next login.
Otherwise, the songs are still unlockable through BLASTER GATE.
info: Week 4 songs: 'Initiating League' and 'Scat Jazz Dance'
Week 5 songs: '最果ての勇者にラブソングを' and '灼ナル刃、破カヰ譜'
Week 7 songs: 'Paradigm Shift' and 'イグノアザーズ'
Week 10 song: 'All We Need is HAPPY END!!!'

events6.name: PCB Refill Stamp Event
events6.desc: Stamp event to earn PCB. Once the stamp goal is complete, it will start over and you can earn more PCB.
events6.info: Toggle this on to enable/disable this stamp event.

events6.name: New Year 2023 Stamp Event
events6.desc: Stamp event to unlock the んだんだぺったん☆二〇二三 appeal card.
events6.info: Toggle this on to enable/disable this stamp event.

events6.name: HIMEHINA Collab Stamp Event
events6.desc: Stamp event to unlock the HIMEHINA crew. Both can be unlocked in any order.
events6.info: Toggle this on to enable/disable this stamp event.

events6.name: SOUND VOLTEX 11th Anniversary Stamp Event
events6.desc: Stamp event to unlock the ボルテ11周年★記念限定カード appeal card to commemorate 11 years of SOUND VOLTEX.
events6.info: Toggle this on to enable/disable this stamp event.

events6.name: Commemorating BEMANI PRO LEAGUE -SEASON 2-! Original Song Contest Special Stamp Event
events6.desc:
Stamp event to unlock 9 songs, including SuddeИDeath. Songs can be unlocked in any order, except for SuddeИDeath, which will be available to unlock once all the other songs are unlocked.

As of 01/30/2024, these songs are now unlockable via BLASTER GATE.
events6.info: Toggle this on to enable/disable this stamp event.

events6.name: KONAMI Arcade Championship (2023) Entry Song
events6.desc: Enabled by entering the Konami Arcade Championship 2023 SOUND VOLTEX qualifiers, this event unlocks the song パーフェクトイーター / Perfect Eater on your next login.
events6.info: Toggle this on to enable/disable this event.

events6.name: KAC(2023) Special Stamp! (Qualifying Round A)
events6.desc: Enabled by entering the Konami Arcade Championship 2023 SOUND VOLTEX qualifiers, this event will start a stamp event to unlock a new song, 累乗のカルマ. Collect 10 stamps to complete the stamp event.
events6.info: Toggle this on to enable/disable this event.

events6.name: BEMANI PRO LEAGUE -SEASON 3- Triple Tribe
events6.desc:
Crossover event between SOUND VOLTEX -Valkyrie model-, DanceDanceRevolution 20th anniversary model, and beatmania IIDX LIGHTNING MODEL cabinets where you would earn TD, TB and TS points which can be used to unlock songs through the participating games.
However, since it's difficult to replicate such crossover event in Asphyxia, you can just toggle the corresponding SOUND VOLTEX songs' option to automatically unlock them on your next login.

events6.name: KAC(2023) Special Stamp! (Qualifying Round B)
events6.desc: Stamp select event to unlock Stylus and QQ and can be unlocked in any order. Collect 10 stamps for each song.
events6.info: Toggle this option to enable/disable this stamp event.

events6.name: CHASE CHASE JOKERS × SOUND VOLTEX collaboration event
events6.desc:
Online crossover event with CHASE CHASE JOKERS. Obtaining 6 stamps on the event site would unlock a song originally from CCJ.

As of 01/30/2024, this song is now unlockable via PCB.
events6.info: Toggle this option on to unlock チェイスチェイスジョーカーズのうた on your next login.

events6.name: New Year 2024 Stamp Event
events6.desc: Stamp event to unlock the 2024 appeal card, plus PCB for the remaining 9 steps.

events6.name: 12th Anniversary Appeal Card Stamp Event
events6.desc: Stamp event to unlock the SDVX 12th anniversary appeal card.
events6.info: Toggle this option to enable/disable this stamp event.

events6.name: 12th Anniversary PCB Refill Stamp Event
events6.desc: Stamp event to earn PCB. Once the stamp goal is complete, it will start over and you can earn more PCB.
events6.info: Toggle this on to enable/disable this stamp event.

events6.name: BEMANI PRO LEAGUE -SEASON 3-! Original Song
events6.desc:
Songs revealed for the BEMANI PRO LEAGUE Season 3 sightread challenges.
Toggle to have the songs from their corresponding week unlocked on the next login.
Otherwise, the songs are still unlockable through BLASTER GATE.
info: Week 1 songs: 'We Are All The Dreamer' and 'Double or Nothing'
Week 2 songs: 'トリコエリヌム▽コンチェルト,' '群青纏う朱の槍,' and 'CHOVERY GOOSE!!!'

Week 4 songs: '花火のおもちゃ箱,' 'イグジスター,' and 'La Nostra Storia!'
Week 5 songs: 'グリーディ・スターズ！,' 'Di-Da-De-Doo,' and 'Break Through Δpex'
Week 6 songs: 'Ars Magna,' 'Inevitable Magic,' and 'LOVE TONIC'
Week 7 songs: 'Crawl Out Immortal,' 'MΔX FLAVØR,' 'SΛMVICΛ,' and '異次元の孤独～カナタノキミヘ～'

events6.name: BEMANI PRO LEAGUE -SEASON 3- Triple Tribe (part 2)
events6.desc:
Crossover event between SOUND VOLTEX -Valkyrie model-, DanceDanceRevolution 20th anniversary model, and beatmania IIDX LIGHTNING MODEL cabinets where you would earn TD, TB and TS points which can be used to unlock songs through the participating games.
However, since it's difficult to replicate such crossover event in Asphyxia, you can just toggle the corresponding SOUND VOLTEX songs' option to automatically unlock them on your next login.

events6.name: BPL S3 Complete Stamp Event
events6.desc:
Stamp event to unlock the BPL S3 SDVX Semifinal songs (Xeno Gravity, Cuz we <3 this Game) and the Final song (NEMSYS ARENA World Hexathlon.)
Clear the songs displayed on the sheet to earn their stamps. A total of 23 stamps can be obtained.
events6.info: Toggle this option to enable/disable this stamp event.

events6.name: Mini Grace NEMSYS Crew Gift
events6.desc: Sent to people who bought tickets for the BPL S3 SDVX Finals event.
events6.info: Toggle this on to automatically get the item.

events6.name: BEMANI PRO LEAGUE -SEASON 3- Original Song Contest Winning Song Special Stamp Event
events6.desc: Similar to BPL S2 stamp event (SuddeИDeath,) this is an event to unlock 10 songs, including { eXLIPXe }. Songs can be unlocked in any order, except for { eXLIPXe }, which will be available to unlock for 30 stamps once all the other songs are unlocked.
events6.info: Toggle this on to enable/disable this stamp event.

events6.name: TAMA猫アドベンチャー (TAMANEKO Adventure)
events6.desc: New unlock system where you complete map missions to earn TAMANEKO food. New and XCD charts are available to unlock, as well as a 'Track Liberation' and a 'OVER ADVENTURE' map.
events6.info: Toggle to enable/disable event.

events6.name: VARIANT GATE 「月輪の紋様」
events6.desc: 1st set of VARIANT GATE. Accumulate VARIANT POWER to make a special song folder appear in EXTRACK, clear the songs at a certain difficulty to obtain keys. Get all keys to play OVER TRACK.
events6.info: Toggle this on to enable/disable this event.

events7.name: hololive Collab Stamp Bonus Event
events7.desc:
A rerun of the hololive stamp bonus events to get hololive appeal cards and appeal titles, as well as new appeal board stickers.
Play songs featuring Shirakami Fubuki, Nekomata Okayu, Tsunomaki Watame, Houshou Marine and Usada Pekora to earn stamps.
If you already obtained the items included in the stamp sheet from the previous event, 1000pc will be obtained instead.

flags.explain: Enables vertical sync for secondary display.
Enables the 50th anniversary KONAMI logo on game startup.
Enables Navigator Christmas greeting (only use one of the greeting flags at a time)
Enables Navigator Valentines Day greeting (only use one of the greeting flags at a time)
Enables Navigator White Day greeting (only use one of the greeting flags at a time)
Enables Navigator Halloween greeting (only use one of the greeting flags at a time)
Enables April Fools 2024 Effect: rainbow lasers. Type V-RAN on song search bar to enable.

flags.key: ゆっくりしていってね！！！ (April Fools 2025)
flags.explain: Enables April Fools 2025 Effect: title screen with Yukkuri SOUND VOLTEX characters, and Yukkuri Rasis navigator.
